title: galium sylvestre var. alpestre
intro: Galium sylvestre var. alpestre, a variety of the alpine bedstraw plant, is a type of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Galium sylvestre var. alpestre include soothing digestive issues, reducing menstrual cramps, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to make salves and ointments for topical application.
